library.title: Skills
library.intro: Reusable tools described in natural language and compiled into a data pipeline. Once built, a Skill can be automated as Auto Patrol or Data Check, or used as a plain tool first.
library.confirmDelete: Delete Skill "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

editor.nlPlaceholder: Describe in natural language what this Skill should do… (e.g. check whether the last 5 process runs of a given tool have ≥2 OOC)
editor.rebuildTitle: Re-run the Agent from the NL description, overwriting the current pipeline
editor.editPipelineTitle: Open Pipeline Builder to adjust the canvas manually
editor.activeBanner: ● Active — this Skill is in effect.
editor.draftBanner: ○ Draft — not in effect yet. Review, then press "Activate" to start.
editor.alarmYes: ✓ System check: pipeline contains an alarm verdict · can be automated as Auto Patrol (you set the alarm condition, the system checks it)
editor.alarmNo: ℹ System check: pipeline has no alarm · usable only as Data Check or tool; to raise alarms, add a verdict condition to the description and recompile.

canvas.notBoundHint: Click "Compile with Pipeline Builder" below to create one

tryRun.description: Run the pipeline once with test inputs to see the verdict and charts. No skill_run is written and no alarm is raised.
tryRun.noInputs: This pipeline declares no input parameters; it runs directly.

embedBanner.willBind: Saving the pipeline will auto-bind it back to the Skill
